query:
SELECT 
  j.id, j.userId, j.title, j.audioUrl, j.audioKey, j.audioDuration,
  j.themePrompt, j.genre, j.mood, j.aspectRatio, j.enableLipSync,
  j.sceneSetting, j.artistType, j.captionsEnabled, j.captionStyle,
  j.enforceStrictMode, j.characterLockEnabled,
  c.id as charId, c.name as charName, c.role as charRole, c.slotIndex,
  c.masterPortraitUrl, c.previewImageUrl, c.lockedDescription, c.characterMode,
  c.enableLipSync as charLipSync, c.isLocked, c.bodyBuild,
  c.lockedOutfit, c.lockedProps, c.lockedRole, c.lockedRules,
  c.characterVisualDetails, c.previewApproved
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN videoCharacters c ON c.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 510098;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
SELECT 
  j.id, j.userId, j.title, j.audioUrl, j.audioKey, j.audioDuration,
  j.themePrompt, j.genre, j.mood, j.aspectRatio, j.enableLipSync,
  j.sceneSetting, j.artistType, j.captionsEnabled, j.captionStyle,
  j.enforceStrictMode, j.characterLockEnabled,
  c.id as charId, c.name as charName, c.role as charRole, c.slotIndex,
  c.masterPortraitUrl, c.previewImageUrl, c.lockedDescription, c.characterMode,
  c.enableLipSync as charLipSync, c.isLocked, c.bodyBuild,
  c.lockedOutfit, c.lockedProps, c.lockedRole, c.lockedRules,
  c.characterVisualDetails, c.previewApproved
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN videoCharacters c ON c.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 510098;

The artist stands at the edge of an empty road stretching into infinity, dust catching the light like embers. Close-up: face turned toward camera, eyes direct, expression calm and powerful. Warm amber and burnt orange colour palette. Cinematic depth of field. No rain, no city, no rooftop.

Visual Style: Cinematic	Cinematic Rock	NULL	16:9	1	Ancient forest clearing, shafts of light breaking through the canopy, mist at ground level, moss-covered stones. Artist at the centre, surrounded by light, ethereal atmosphere. Deep greens and gold.	solo_artist	0	bottom	1	1	390002	Zara	Lead Vocalist	0	https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663500868908/ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx/generated/1778695377509.png	https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663500868908/ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx/generated/1778695377509.png	A full-length standing figure of Zara, a mixed-race British woman in her late 20s, with a very slim, narrow frame, lean physique, and slender build. Her warm medium-brown skin is natural, complementing her sharp cheekbones, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, and full lips. Her natural textured hair, shoulder-length, is worn loose. She holds a confident, direct gaze. She wears a form-fitting black leather jacket, layered gold necklaces, and several gold rings. Her lower half is clad in distressed dark-wash skinny jeans that accentuate her slender legs, narrow knees, and lean calves. She completes the look with black ankle boots, covering her feet and ankles, featuring a subtle heel. Sharp cheekbones, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, full lips, warm medium-brown skin. Natural textured hair worn loose, shoulder length. Confident, direct gaze. Wearing a fitted black leather jacket, gold jewellery. Strong presence, effortlessly cool.	1
